timeline_html:
Summary. Andreja noticed her hair thinning over a year ago, with shedding that peaked some time ago and has since remained fairly steady. She’s also seen baby hairs regrow months ago, suggesting her scalp has already begun recovery. 🌱

Your hair-loss triggers.

  • Major emotional stress (ongoing; started date not provided)

Timeline forecast. Emotional stress began over a year ago and likely set off shedding about 2–3 months later, with the heaviest loss around late 2024. Based on typical recovery timing, stabilization would be expected by early 2025 and visible regrowth by spring 2025, though ongoing stress could slightly extend this window. Dominant driver: Ongoing emotional stress fits the timeline of onset and continues to influence the hair cycle, making it the main driver of current shedding patterns.

Where you are now. You’re in the stabilization to early regrowth phase—shedding has steadied and baby hairs confirm follicles are reactivating. Keep supporting stress balance and sleep, as consistency helps this new growth mature.
